nasb.text: O Lord, You have brought up my soul from Sheol; You have kept me alive, that I would not go down to the pit.

esv.text: O Lord, you have brought up my soul from Sheol; you restored me to life from among those who go down to the pit.

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！你曾把我從陰間救上來， 使我存活，不至於下坑。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，你从阴间把我救出， 没有让我落入坟墓。

csbs.text: 耶和华啊，你把我的灵魂从阴间带上来， 使我存活，不至于下到阴坑！
